chapter_title.en: The Obligation of the jumu’ah Prayer, Its Virtue, Who is Exempt From it, and the Prayer and Sermon Therein

text: 1244 - وَ رَوَى دَاوُدُ بْنُ سِرْحَانَ عَنْ أَبِي عَبْدِ اَللَّهِ عَلَيْهِ اَلسَّلاَمُ: فِي قَوْلِ اَللَّهِ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ «وَ شٰاهِدٍ وَ مَشْهُودٍ» قَالَ «اَلشَّاهِدُ يَوْمُ اَلْجُمُعَةِ.

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.1244 - Dawud ibn Sirhan narrated from Imam Jafar ibn Muhammad Al-Sadiq (as) regarding the verse of Allah (swt), the Exalted, "By the witness and the witnessed" (Surah Al-Buruj 85:3).
Imam (as) said: "The 'witness' is the day of Jumu’ah."
